# 👋 About Me

I'm **Gangadhar**, a **Senior Software Engineer and Engineering Mentor** who builds **SaaS platforms, developer tools, and scalable web applications**.

I enjoy building **real-world products that solve operational problems** and help businesses automate workflows.

My current focus:

- SaaS Platforms
- Developer Productivity Tools
- Automation Systems
- AI-assisted applications
- Scalable backend architecture

---

# 🚀 Featured Projects

## 🏠 PGFlow
A modern **PG / Rental Management SaaS platform** that helps property owners manage tenants, rent payments, room allocations, and operations.

Features include:

- Tenant management
- Rent tracking
- Payment automation
- Notifications
- Operational dashboards

🔗 https://pgflow.in

---

## 📝 MarkdownPaste
A **developer-focused markdown sharing platform** designed for fast and secure document sharing.

Features:

- Public & Private documents
- Password protected documents
- Edit keys
- Instant sharing
- Markdown rendering

🔗 https://www.markdownpaste.com

---

## 🧠 AppInfinity
A development lab where I build **developer tools, SaaS platforms, and experimental products**.

🔗 https://appinfinity.in
